name: zoom-explorer
description: Tools for exploring the Zoom MS Plus series of effect pedals

scripts.build: npm run build:clean && tsc && npm run build:copy-public
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && npm exec tauri build
scripts.tauri:android:dev: npm run build && npm exec tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:ios:dev: npm run build && npm exec tauri ios dev

author: Thomas Hammer
